name: nested generate for loops
description: Code should include nested generate for loops using distinct genvar variables for each loop level
snippet:
genvar i, j;
generate
  for (i = 0; i < 2; i = i + 1) begin : outer
    for (j = 0; j < 2; j = j + 1) begin : inner
    end
  end
endgenerate

name: genvar as index in hierarchical attribute access
description: Code should include a generate for loop whose genvar variable is used as an index inside a hierarchical reference or attribute access expression

name: interface array with genvar indexed member access
description: Code should include an array of interface instances where a genvar is used to index both the interface array and a member signal within the same expression
